tool.name: tiktok_bulk_search
tool.description: Search multiple queries on TikTok in parallel using concurrent browser tabs. Use this instead of calling tiktok_search multiple times - it is faster and more efficient. Pass all queries as a single comma-separated string. Example: 'cooking tips,dance challenge,funny cats'.

parameters.name: queries
parameters.description: Comma-separated search queries (e.g. 'recipe ideas,workout routine,travel vlog')
